heading: Get in touch
intro: Whether you're considering therapy or coaching for yourself, or looking to book me to speak or run a workshop, I'd be glad to hear from you.

paths.title: Therapy & coaching
paths.body: One-to-one support for men, in person or online — anxiety, relationships, addiction, masculinity and more.

paths.title: Speaking & workshops
paths.body: Keynotes and workplace workshops on men's mental health, masculinity and wellbeing — for workplaces, schools, universities and conferences.

steps.title: Reach out
steps.body: Send an email, call or text — whatever feels easiest. Tell me as much or as little as you like.

steps.title: A free 15-minute call
steps.body: We'll have a no-obligation video chat about what's going on and whether we're a good fit.

steps.title: Your first session
steps.body: If it feels right, we'll find a time that works and begin — at your pace.
